name: FarmDash Futures Strategist
description: Adaptive Hyperliquid perps execution engine for OpenClaw agents. Provides research, pre-trade simulation, predictive funding shifts, and zero-custody EIP-712 order routing with forensic telemetry. Scout (5/day), Pioneer (unlimited), and Syndicate (unlimited) execution supported.
author: FarmDash Pioneers (@Parmasanandgarlic)

tools.name: scan_funding_rates
tools.description: Scan cross-venue funding opportunities. (v3.0: Includes Predictive Funding Shift indicators).

tools.name: scan_market_conditions
tools.description: Read EMA, RSI, MACD, ADX, ATR, Bollinger Bands, volume ratio, Z-score, and Hyperliquid oracle latency for one perp asset.

tools.name: get_futures_account
tools.description: Inspect equity, open positions, available margin, drawdown state, and guardrail pressure.

tools.name: analyze_futures_strategy
tools.description: Primary research tool. Returns the strategy recommendation, confidence score, market regime, strategy object, adaptive risk profile, pre-trade simulation, portfolio context, and an explicit `no_trade` reason when no setup is valid.

tools.name: calculate_position_size
tools.description: Inspect sizing math separately when the user wants to validate risk and margin.

tools.name: execute_perp_order
tools.description: Execute only after research and explicit user confirmation. Generates 11-field Forensic receipt on settlement.

tools.name: cancel_perp_order
tools.description: Cancel stale or superseded open orders.

tools.name: get_agent_performance
tools.description: Use as the feedback loop for strategy review, drawdown response, shadow-mode drift checks, and campaign-level confidence adjustments. Backed by `https://www.farmdash.one/api/v1/agent/performance`.

FARMDASH_API_KEY.description: Optional Bearer token for Pioneer or Syndicate tier. Scout mode works with no key or with the public fd_scout_free token. Never share private keys, seed phrases, or mnemonics with this skill — perps execution uses EIP-712 local signing only via the user's Hyperliquid API wallet.
